rule.name: show_code
rule.description: Code unchanged. No markdown if obvious.
rule.before: I'll fix the typo. Here's the corrected code: ```javascript const value = 42; ```

rule.name: diff
rule.description: Show only changed lines. Context if needed.
rule.before: I need to change line 15 from: ```javascript const x = getValue(); ``` to: ```javascript const x = getValue() ?? 0; ```

rule.name: multiple_changes
rule.description: List files changed. Brief reason each.
rule.example: Changed: - auth.js: added null check - utils.js: fixed typo - index.js: removed unused import

rule.name: error_fix
rule.example: Error: TypeError line 23 Cause: user undefined Fix: add guard clause
